summary: Caching regex test results for UPPERCASE and LOWERCASE patterns in Map data structures reduces redundant pattern matching operations. The cache is populated lazily on first access for each character. This provides a ~1.2% throughput improvement (587,467 → 594,452 ops/sec).

Caching character classification (uppercase/lowercase) via Map lookups eliminates redundant regex engine invocations in the hot loop. The isUpperCase and isLowerCase helper functions check the cache before calling UPPERCASE.test() and LOWERCASE.test(). This optimization provides a ~1.7% throughput improvement (587,467 → 597,372 ops/sec), outperforming the previous best of 594,452 ops/sec.
